# Pointer

15&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-preview" data-di-preview="true" class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" ## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Pointer;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Pointer { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
mouse

## Categories
cursors
